title: Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary
tagline: Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Tamil Nadu

heroImage.alt: Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary, Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary is a protected area located in Tirunelveli of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.
overview.description: Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary is a protected area located in Tirunelveli of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The sanctuary covers an area of 288.4 km2 (111.4 sq mi) and was notified in 2013.

topPlaces.name: Gangaikondan
topPlaces.description: Gangaikondan is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district and a suburb of Tirunelveli city in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located about 20 km north of Tirunelveli on the way to Madurai on NH 44.

topPlaces.name: Sankarnagar
topPlaces.description: Sankar Nagar or Thalaiyuthu is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located about 8 km north of Tirunelveli on the way to Madurai on highway NH 44.

topPlaces.name: Indian Cement Company Ground
topPlaces.description: Indian Cement Company Ground, also known as ICL Sankar Nagar Cricket Ground is a cricket ground located in Tirunelveli in Tamil Nadu, India. The ground is in Bala Vidyalaya School run by India Cements.

topPlaces.name: Thenkalam
topPlaces.description: Thenkalam, officially called Tenkulam, is a village in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, India. It lies about 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from the city of Tirunelveli and about 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from Sankarnagar, a suburb of Tirunelveli which lies on the way to Madurai on National Highway 44.

topPlaces.name: Chittar River
topPlaces.description: Chittar River and its five tributaries and numerous other contributing streams originate in the Courtallam hills of Tenkasi district in the state of Tamil Nadu in southern India. Together with its tributaries and streams, the Chittar River serves as an important source of irrigation for the region and is a major tributary of the Tambaraparani River along with the Manimuthar River.

topPlaces.name: Naranammalpuram
topPlaces.description: Naranammalpuram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Kodiyankulam
topPlaces.description: Kodiyankulam is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located at a distance of 11 km from Tiruvaikuntam, 21 km from Tirunelveli, 43 km from Thoothukudi, 77 km from Tenkasi and 147 km from Madurai.

items.note: Gangaikondan is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district and a suburb of Tirunelveli city in the state of Tamil Nadu, India. It is located about 20 km north of Tirunelveli on the way to Madurai on NH 44.

Indian Cement Company Ground, also known as ICL Sankar Nagar Cricket Ground is a cricket ground located in Tirunelveli in Tamil Nadu, India. The ground is in Bala Vidyalaya School run by India Cements.

Thenkalam, officially called Tenkulam, is a village in the Tirunelveli district of Tamil Nadu, India. It lies about 13 kilometres (8.1 mi) from the city of Tirunelveli and about 5 kilometres (3.1 mi) from Sankarnagar, a suburb of Tirunelveli which lies on the way to Madurai on National Highway 44.

Chittar River and its five tributaries and numerous other contributing streams originate in the Courtallam hills of Tenkasi district in the state of Tamil Nadu in southern India. Together with its tributaries and streams, the Chittar River serves as an important source of irrigation for the region and is a major tributary of the Tambaraparani River along with the Manimuthar River.
Naranammalpuram is a panchayat town in Tirunelveli district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu.

Kodiyankulam is a panchayat town in Thoothukudi district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is located at a distance of 11 km from Tiruvaikuntam, 21 km from Tirunelveli, 43 km from Thoothukudi, 77 km from Tenkasi and 147 km from Madurai.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Thiruvananthapuram International Airport (100 km) and the nearest railway station is Thiruvananthapuram Central (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Gangaikondan Spotted Deer Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gangaikondan, Sankarnagar, Indian Cement Company Ground, Thenkalam, Chittar River.
